scripts.build: npm run build -w @supbot/shared && npm run build -w @supbot/runtime && npm run build -w @supbot/ui && npm run build -w hbclient
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @supbot/shared && npm run build -w @supbot/runtime && npm run dev -w hbclient
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run test -w @supbot/runtime && npm run smoke:electron
scripts.verify:release: npm audit --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org && npm run verify && npm run dist:win
scripts.pack:linux: npm run build && npm pack -w hbclient
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run dist:win -w hbclient
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm run dist:linux -w hbclient
